message:
🌱 Add valkey: [NEW] Add CMake support mission (#1353)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "valkey-79-new-add-cmake-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "valkey: [NEW] Add CMake support",
+    "description": "[NEW] Add CMake support. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current valkey setup",
+        "description": "Verify your valkey version and configuration:\n```bash\nvalkey-server --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working valkey installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review valkey configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant valkey configuration:\nWe can support both Makefile and CMake compilation methods. This requirement is also mentioned in https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey/issues/17."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [NEW] Add CMake support",
+        "description": "This PR was tested on:\n- Amazon Linux 2\n- Ubuntu 22.04\n- AlmaLinux 9\n- macOS Sonoma 14.7\n- FreeBSD 9 -\n\non FreeBSD, we require `gmake` for building `valkey`\n\n---\n\nWith this PR, users are able to build valkey using `CMake`.\n\n## Example usage:\n\nBuild `valkey-server` in Release mode with TLS enabled\n```yaml\nmkdir build-release\ncd $_\ncmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \\\n         -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/tmp/valkey-install \\\n         -DWITH_MALLOC=jemalloc -DWITH_TLS=1\nmake -j$(nproc) install\n\n# start valkey\n/tmp/valkey-install/bin/valkey-server\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"[NEW] Add CMake support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR was tested on:\n- Amazon Linux 2\n- Ubuntu 22.04\n- AlmaLinux 9\n- macOS Sonoma 14.7\n- FreeBSD 9 -\n\non FreeBSD, we require `gmake` for building `valkey`\n\n---\n\nWith this PR, users are able to build valkey using `CMake`.\n\n## Example usage:\n\nBuild `valkey-server` in Release mode with TLS enabled and using `jemalloc` as the allocator:\n\n```bash\nmkdir build-release\ncd $_\ncmake ..",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "mkdir build-release\ncd $_\ncmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \\\n         -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/tmp/valkey-install \\\n         -DWITH_MALLOC=jemalloc -DWITH_TLS=1\nmake -j$(nproc) install\n\n# start valkey\n/tmp/valkey-install/bin/valkey-server",
+        "mkdir build-release-ut\ncd $_\ncmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \\\n         -DWITH_MALLOC=jemalloc -DBUILD_TESTS=1\nmake -j$(nproc)\n\n# Run the tests\n./bin/valkey-unit-tests",
+        "mkdir build-asan\ncd $_\ncmake .. -DWITH_SANITIZER=address -DWITH_MALLOC=libc\nmake -j$(nproc)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "valkey",
+      "community",
+      "cache",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "valkey"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey/issues/79",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey/pull/1082"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 22,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "valkey-server",
+      "valkey-cli"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working valkey installation or development environment."
+  },
